note.label: Note:
note.multipleIntervals: This will create {{count}} separate subscription records (one for each billing interval: {{intervals}}). Each will be billed according to its respective interval.
note.singleInterval: This will create a subscription plan record for the selected client. The billing will be processed according to the plan's interval.
